activity_question: What prestigious award did Tim Brown win in college?

title: Slick Watts: Basketball's Defensive Dynamo
story: Slick Watts dribbled his way into basketball history on July 22, 1951. Born in Rolling Fork, Mississippi, Watts grew up to become a stellar point guard in the NBA. Watts's defensive skills were so impressive, he earned a spot on the NBA All-Defensive First Team.
